name: The High Roller
desc: +3 Mult for every 6 in scored hand.

name: Lowrider
desc: +4 Mult for every 1 in scored hand.

name: Even Steven
desc: +50 Chips if hand is all even.

name: Oddball
desc: +50 Chips if hand is all odd.

name: Straight Shooter
desc: +12 Mult on any Straight.

name: Pair Bond
desc: +20 Chips on Pairs / Two Pair.

name: Three's Company
desc: Three-of-a-Kind base score triggers twice.

name: Junk Dealer
desc: High Card grants +300 Chips.

name: Royal Flush
desc: Five-of-a-Kind: +500 Chips +50 Mult.

name: Full House Fanatic
desc: +1 Mult each time Full House is played.

name: Energy Saver
desc: Unspent Energy yields +$2 instead of +$1.

name: Card Counter
desc: +1 Mult per card held when scoring.

name: Discard Synergy
desc: +10 Chips per card played/discarded this round.

name: The Underdog
desc: +20 Mult if score < 10% of target.

name: Rich Get Richer
desc: +1 Mult per $10 held.

name: Golden Die
desc: One random die face is Golden (+50 chips).

name: Four-Leaf Clover
desc: +1 free full board re-roll per hand.

name: The Escalator
desc: +1 Mult for each consecutive hand in a round.

name: Stubborn Mule
desc: +5 Mult for same poker hand twice in a row.

name: The Scrapper
desc: +$1 to wallet every time you play an Active Card.
